hypothesis: On the ChemX nanozyme and chelate datasets, a single-agent pipeline that uses marker-pdf for structured text extraction and GPT‑4o image captioning feeding downstream LLMs (GPT‑4.1/GPT‑5/GPT‑OSS‑20b) will achieve significantly higher per-column F1 scores (precision and recall) for end-to-end chemical information extraction than baseline GPT‑5/GPT‑5 Thinking, the ChatGPT Agent, and existing domain-specific multi-agent systems because preserving document structure and integrating multimodal descriptions improves extraction accuracy.
